inputs.titre: Écoutes au News of the World

reason: The image depicts a modern newsroom setting with elements that are anachronistic for 2011. While landline phones and computers existed then, the style and modern design of the cubicles, flat screen monitors and general office aesthetic are more contemporary. The presence of what appears to be modern ATM machines in the background is also anachronistic for a newsroom setting during the 'News of the World' scandal period. The suits and clothing worn by the figures generally fit the era, but the overall modern design makes it unsuitable for precise historical accuracy. The 'Breaking News' display on the large screens appears relevant to current events rather than reflecting headlines specifically from 2011 related to the 'News of the World' scandal.
